root_cause: Queries scan too much data or full tables
recommendation: Partition tables, cluster tables, filter partitions, avoid SELECT *, use materialized views where suitable

root_cause: Old or unused datasets continue to incur storage cost
recommendation: Apply table expiration, partition expiration, lifecycle governance and archive policies

root_cause: Long runtimes, high worker count or poor autoscaling increase processing cost
recommendation: Review worker utilisation, enable autoscaling, optimise transforms, reduce shuffle and right-size workers

root_cause: Unused objects and long retention increase storage cost
recommendation: Use lifecycle management, choose correct storage classes and delete stale data

root_cause: Projects can exceed planned monthly spend without guardrails
recommendation: Create budgets, set threshold rules and notify owners early

root_cause: High-volume logs can increase ingestion and retention cost
recommendation: Use log exclusions, sinks, retention controls and route only required logs
